name: Wavelet
comment: Token classes mirror the Wavelet lexer (src/lexer.rs) and the shared Prism grammar (docs/src/prism/wavelet.js). Keep the two in sync.

macro.comment: TitleCase macro head: leading capital, at least one lowercase, no hyphen (the lexer's is_title). Reader sugar for a macro call.
macro.name: keyword.control.macro.wavelet

call-head.comment: Attachment rule: a (possibly %-escaped, possibly qualified) name immediately followed by ( is a call head. Only ( attaches now. Also covers the name in a chained call (recv.name(...)), which abuts its own (.
call-head.name: entity.name.function.wavelet

namespace.comment: The alias side of a free-standing qualified reference (kv/get as a value).
namespace.name: entity.name.namespace.wavelet

punctuation.comment: . is the chain operator (recv.name(...)); the number rule above already claims any decimal point, so a bare . is always a chain dot.
punctuation.name: punctuation.wavelet
